CONTACT MORTGAGE COMPANY TO PAY MORTGAGE OUT OF ESCROW. IF UNABLE TO DO SO, THEN PET TO CONTACT OPPOSING COUNSEL TO OBTAIN MONEY FROM TRUST ACCOUNT.
